subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! The tablet thou didst send, which bore the gems of submission and contentment, and betokened grief and sorrow, hath reached Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی لوح مرسوله که حاکی بود از جواهر تسلیم و رضا و مشعر بود بر حزن و اندوه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
